info.name: Airport Service Management Platform API
info.description: Complete API collection for testing the Airport Service Management Platform. Includes authentication, admin, staff, vendor, and finance endpoints.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: User authentication and session management endpoints

request.description: Register a new admin user
Register a new airline staff user
Register a vendor for refueling services
Register a vendor for catering services
Register a new finance user
Login with username/email and password. Tokens are automatically saved to collection variables.
Logout the currently logged in user
Refresh the access token using refresh token

item.name: 👨‍✈️ Admin Operations
item.description: Airport admin endpoints for flight and user management

request.description: Verify admin role access
Register a new flight. The flight ID is saved automatically for subsequent requests.
Get all registered flights
Get all registered users
Remove a user by username or email
Update flight status (scheduled, arrived, departed)
Mark flight as departed
Get detailed turnaround summary for a flight

item.name: ✈️ Airline Staff Operations
item.description: Airline staff endpoints for service requests and management

request.description: Verify airline staff access
Get all arrived flights that need servicing

Request multiple services for a flight. Service types: REFUELING, CATERING, BAGGAGE_HANDLING, CABIN_CLEANING, LINE_MAINTENANCE, WATER_SERVICE, LAVATORY_SERVICE, PUSHBACK_TOWING, GROUND_HANDLING, FLIGHT_INSPECTION, BAGGAGE_UNLOADING
Request a single service for a flight
Get all service requests for a specific flight
Verify a completed service (triggers billing calculation)

item.name: 🔧 Vendor Operations
item.description: Service vendor endpoints for task management

request.description: Verify vendor access
Get all pending and in-progress tasks matching vendor's specialization
Claim and start working on a service request
Update service progress with quantity used
Mark service as completed with final quantity used

item.name: 💰 Finance Operations
item.description: Finance team endpoints for tariffs, invoices, and revenue

request.description: Verify finance role access
Create or update tariff for refueling service
Create or update tariff for catering service
Create or update tariff for cabin cleaning (fixed rate)
Create or update tariff for baggage handling
Use this to create remaining tariffs. Run multiple times with different bodies for: WATER_SERVICE, LAVATORY_SERVICE, PUSHBACK_TOWING, GROUND_HANDLING, FLIGHT_INSPECTION, BAGGAGE_UNLOADING
Get all configured tariffs
Delete a tariff by service type
Get all invoices

item.name: Get All Invoices - Filter by Status

request.description: Get invoices filtered by status (draft, pending_approval, approved, rejected, paid)

item.name: Get All Invoices - Filter by Airline

request.description: Get invoices filtered by airline name
Get detailed invoice by ID
Generate invoice for a flight (moves from DRAFT to PENDING_APPROVAL)
Approve a pending invoice
Reject an invoice with reason
Mark an approved invoice as paid
Get overall revenue summary
Get revenue summary for a specific date range
Step 1: Login as admin to register a flight
Step 2: Register a new flight
Step 3: Mark flight as arrived to enable service requests
Step 4: Login as airline staff
Step 5: Request refueling service
Step 6: Login as refueling vendor
Step 7: Get assigned tasks
Step 8: Start the service
Step 9: Complete service with actual quantity
Step 10: Login as staff to verify service
Step 11: Verify service and trigger billing
Step 12: Login as finance
Step 13: Generate invoice for the flight
Step 14: Approve the invoice
Step 15: Mark invoice as paid - workflow complete!
